positive_scenarios.title: Login succeeds with valid credentials
positive_scenarios.description: A registered user can log in using a correct email and password combination.
preconditions: A user account exists with known credentials
The user is on the login page
steps: Enter a valid registered email address
Enter the correct password for that account
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The user is redirected to the dashboard and their name is displayed

positive_scenarios.title: User can log out successfully
positive_scenarios.description: An authenticated user can terminate their session by logging out.
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the dashboard
steps: Click the account menu or logout button
Confirm the logout action if prompted
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The user is redirected to the login page and the session is cleared

positive_scenarios.title: User session persists after page refresh
positive_scenarios.description: An authenticated user remains logged in after refreshing the browser.
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The user remains authenticated and the page loads correctly
